    1→// A good string consists of only 'a' and 'b' with every two consecutive letters distinct.\n     2→ghost predicate IsGoodString(s: seq<char>)\n     3→{\n     4→  (forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: s[i] counts are non-negative and they differ by at most 1.\n    10→ghost predicate GoodStringWithCounts(na: int, nb: int)\n    11→{\n    12→  na >= 0 && nb >= 0 && na - nb <= 1 && nb - na <= 1\n    13→}\n concatenating them in some order.\n    18→//\n    19→// Selecting pa single-\"a\" pieces, pb single-\"b\" pieces, and pc \"ab\" pieces\n    20→// gives (pa + pc) total 'a'-characters and (pb + pc) 1 :: s[i] != s[i+1])\n}\n\n// A good string with na 'a'-characters and nb 'b'-characters exists iff\n// both counts are non-negative and they differ by at most 1.\nghost predicate GoodStringWithCounts(na: int, nb: int)\n{\n  na >= 0 && nb >= 0 && na - nb <= 1 && nb - na <= 1\n}\n\n// Whether a good string of exactly `len` characters can be formed by choosing\n// some subset of the available pieces (at most a \"a\"s, b \"b\"s, c \"ab\"s)\n// and concatenating them in some order.\n//\n// Selecting pa single-\"a\" pieces, pb single-\"b\" pieces, and pc \"ab\" pieces\n// gives (pa + pc) total 'a'-characters and (pb + pc) total 'b'-characters,\n// for a total length of pa + pb + 2*pc. A good string from these pieces\n// exists iff the character counts differ by at most 1 — any such selection\n// can be arranged into a valid good string.\nghost predicate AchievableLength(len: int, a: int, b: int, c: int)\n{\n  a >= 0 && b >= 0 && c >= 0 &&\n  exists pa | 0 <= pa <= a ::\n    exists pb | 0 <= pb <= b ::\n      exists pc | 0 <= pc <= c ::\n        GoodStringWithCounts(pa + pc, pb + pc) &&\n        pa + pb + 2 * pc == len\n}\n\nmethod AnotherOneBitesTheDust(a: int, b: int, c: int) returns (maxLen: int)\n  requires a >= 0 && b >= 0 && c >= 0\n  ensures AchievableLength(maxLen, a, b, c)\n  ensures forall n | maxLen < n <= a + b + 2 * c :: !AchievableLength(n, a, b, c)\n{\n  var x := a + c;\n  var y := b + c;\n\n  if x > y {\n    x := y + 1;\n  }\n  if y > x {\n    y := x + 1;\n  }\n\n  return x + y;\n}","numLines":50,"startLine":1,"totalLines":50}}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_018KyFnVbLvejTr2ecyh9XJg","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Let me analyze this carefully.\n\nThe method computes:\n- x = a + c (total possible a-characters using all single-a and all ab pieces)\n- y = b + c (total possible b-characters using all single-b and all ab pieces)\n- Then caps: if x > y, set x = y + 1; if y > x, set y = x + 1\n- Returns x + y\n\nI need to prove two things:\n1. `AchievableLength(maxLen, a, b, c)` - the returned length is achievable\n2. `forall n | maxLen < n <= a + b + 2 * c :: !AchievableLength(n, a, b, c)` - no longer length is achievable\n\n\n3. + pc) &&\n        pa + pb + 2 * pc == len\n}\n\nlemma NotAchievable(n: int, a: int, b: int, c: int, maxLen: int)\n  requires a >= 0 && b >= 0 && c >= 0\n  requires n > maxLen\n  requires if a == b }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":28002,"cache_read_input_tokens":19627,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":28002},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"853ca08b-f63f-4dcc-be58-9bbdad5eca21","uuid":"58742d58-1dce-4185-9269-73b4e62eb3fe"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YbiELfNDbzaN2BnGUFoMQ3","type":"tool_result","content":"File }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":627,"cache_read_input_tokens":48988,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":627},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"853ca08b-f63f-4dcc-be58-9bbdad5eca21","uuid":"8ea4bf2b-2037-4a5c-aa90-04a665513d5e"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QcaWNg9aS6b2BYbB7V9ZAg","type":"tool_result","content":"The
